meta.title: Manufacturing & Quality — PT Victorindo Kimiatama
meta.description: VK's facility combines advanced manufacturing technology with proven processes — laboratory-grade quality control and an R&D innovation hub in Karawang, West Java.

hero.heading: Trusted Manufacturing
hero.lede: Our facility combines advanced manufacturing technology with proven processes to deliver consistent, high-quality output.

facility.heading: Built for Consistent Supply
facility.imageAlt: Aerial view of the PT Victorindo Kimiatama production facility in Karawang, Jawa Barat

features.title: R&D & Technical Service
features.desc: Dedicated team focused on product quality improvement, new formulations, and application innovation.

features.title: Quality Control System
features.desc: Rigorous in-process and finished goods testing ensures every batch meets strict quality standards.

features.title: Consistent Supply
features.desc: Production scheduling and inventory management to reliably meet customer demand at all times.

features.title: Superior Distribution
features.desc: Extensive distribution network with modern management systems — delivering reliably across Indonesia.

capacity.heading: Capacity by Product Line
capacity.lede: Per shift per month production capacity across all product lines, powered by modern manufacturing equipment and expert formulation teams. Units in Metric Tons (MT).
capacity.aria: Production capacity in metric tons per shift per month
capacity.footnote: Proven Track Record — Trusted by Leading Companies

stages.heading: From Raw Material to Finished Batch

cards.title: Mixing & Formulation
cards.desc: Raw materials are batched and blended under controlled formulation procedures.
cards.imageAlt: Operator transferring raw material from a drum into a stainless-steel mixing tank

cards.title: Filling & Packing
cards.desc: Automated filling lines maintain accurate volume and clean, consistent packaging.
cards.imageAlt: Blinken can on the automated filling machine

cards.title: Warehouse & Distribution
cards.desc: Finished goods are staged for reliable, on-schedule delivery across Indonesia.
cards.imageAlt: Forklift moving pallets of Steelux and Blinken cartons inside the VK warehouse

qc.heading: Precision at Every Step
qc.lede: Laboratory-grade testing ensures our coatings perform beyond expectations, consistently.

cards.title: Color Measurement
cards.desc: Verification of color accuracy and consistency using precision measurement instruments.

cards.title: Physical Testing
cards.desc: Testing of product physical properties to ensure quality meets established standards.

cards.title: Coating Performance
cards.desc: Evaluation of coating durability and performance under various application conditions.

cards.title: Production Control
cards.desc: Quality control throughout the production process to maintain consistency in every batch.

photos.imageAlt: QC analyst verifying color accuracy with a spectrophotometer and MSQC software
QC technician running a viscosity test on a Krebs viscometer

rnd.heading: Innovation & Technology
rnd.lede: Backed by over 45 years of formulation expertise, our R&D team develops cutting-edge coating technologies tailored to Indonesian conditions.
rnd.imageAlt: VK R&D chemists working at the formulation laboratory
rnd.secondImageAlt: Colorist weighing a formulation sample beside a Blinken can in the color lab

cards.title: New Formulation Development
cards.desc: Continuous development of advanced coating formulations using modern technologies and global standards.

cards.title: Application Innovation
cards.desc: Developing innovative application methods to improve coating efficiency and finish quality.

cards.title: Sustainability Initiatives
cards.desc: Developing eco-friendly, low-VOC formulations that meet evolving industry standards.

cards.title: Performance Testing
cards.desc: Advanced laboratory testing for UV, salt spray, adhesion, and impact resistance.

cards.title: Color Science & Matching
cards.desc: Multi-angle spectrophotometry and chroma metering for precise color matching.

cards.title: Process Optimization
cards.desc: Lean manufacturing and continuous improvement to optimize production efficiency and consistency.

ctaBand.label: Factory Visit
ctaBand.heading: See our manufacturing and QC standards up close.
